name: Open Questions Tracker
description: When a deliverable document is created or edited, check for unknowns that should be tracked as open questions

then.prompt: A deliverable document was just edited. Scan it for any assumptions, unknowns, or 'I don't know' statements that should be tracked. If you find any that aren't already in an Open Questions section, remind the user that these need to be resolved and suggest adding them to the document's Open Questions section. Every assumption is a risk until it's validated.
